testcase.name: test_health_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:974: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:38: in test_health_endpoint data = response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:978: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_root_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:974: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:50: in test_root_endpoint data = response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:978: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_api_base_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:57: in test_api_base_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"API base endpoint failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: API base endpoint failed: {"error": "Backend starting, please retry"} E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_swagger_docs_loads

failure.message: AssertionError: Swagger docs failed: 520 assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:71: in test_swagger_docs_loads assert response.status_code == 200, f"Swagger docs failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Swagger docs failed: 520 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:89: in test_login_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error": "Backend starting, please retry"} E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_invalid_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error status, got: 520 assert 520 in [400, 401, 500] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:108: in test_login_invalid_credentials assert response.status_code in [400, 401, 500], f"Expected error status, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected error status, got: 520 E assert 520 in [400, 401, 500] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error status, got: 520 assert 520 in [400, 401, 500] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
